:::{.reference_box}
::::{.reference_box_header}
To cite this case study, please use:
::::
::::{.inner_block}
Thomas, Oshane O. and Wright, Carrie and Isaacs, Kate. (2026). [https://github.com/opencasestudies/ocs-bio-temporal](https://github.com/opencasestudies/ocs-bio-temporal){target="_blank"}. Discovering Temporal Immune Programs with CoGAPS in Single-Cell Dengue Infection Data (Version 0.1.0).
::::
:::
